title: Poor error message with two always blocks named the same
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Run yosys on the following Verilog:

```verilog
module foo(input clk);

always @(posedge clk) begin:foo
    reg bar;
    bar <= ~bar;
end

always @(posedge clk) begin:foo
    reg bar;
    bar <= ~bar;
end

endmodule
```

## Expected behavior

Perhaps something like
```
foo.v:12: ERROR: duplicate declaration of block `foo`.
```

## Actual behavior

```
foo.v:12: ERROR: Failed to detect width for identifier \foo.bar!
```

Where the real cause is the duplicate block name.
